issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling for tool failures and edge cases.
Only one realistic example is provided; more demonstrations are needed.

scenarios.name: Cross-platform username search with Wayback archives
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentions Sherlock and the simpler wayback/available endpoint but misses the CDX search API with documented params; treatment uses Sherlock with --print-found/--csv and calls the CDX endpoint with the exact params from the skill.

scenarios.name: Instagram public profile stats and post locations
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gets the right Instaloader API surface but omits exception handling and max_posts limiting; treatment uses Profile.from_username, iterates get_posts with a cap, extracts location/tagged_users, and handles ProfileNotExistsException and PrivateProfileNotFollowedException.
